name: Fresh Grapes in Grappa
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose the largest and firmest grapes and clip off leaving a little of the stems attached to each.
2. Fill a 1 quart glass jar with the fruit and add the sugar and enough grappa or brandy to cover the grapes.
3. Cover the mixture and shake gently to dissolve the sugar.
4. Place the jar in sunlight with its cover ajar and let stand for 1 week.
5. Cover tightly and store in cool dark place at least 3 months.
